task_completion.description: The expected title is typed at the top of the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'AeroTurbine 500-X Operator Manual' is visible at the very top of the document canvas.

task_completion.description: An automatic Table of Contents is inserted below the title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Table of Contents block (typically with a gray background field or a formal 'Table of Contents' heading generated by the software) is visible below the title.

task_completion.description: The five chapter files are linked into the Master Document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Navigator' panel shows linked files (e.g., 01_introduction.odt, 02_safety_protocols.odt) under the Master Document structure, or the 'Insert' dialog is actively being used to add these files as links.

task_completion.description: The linked chapters are arranged in numerical order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Navigator' panel, the linked files are listed in ascending order from 01 to 05.

task_completion.description: The document is saved to the correct path with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog shows the path '/home/ga/Documents/' and the filename 'AeroTurbine_Master.odm', or the main application window title bar displays 'AeroTurbine_Master.odm'.

integrity.description: The agent used the word processor GUI to create the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenOffice/LibreOffice Writer GUI, rather than terminal commands constructing an XML/ODM file manually.

integrity.description: The chapter files were linked as required, not copy-pasted.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Navigator panel shows the files as linked subdocuments. There should be no evidence of the agent opening each chapter file to select and copy its text.

integrity.description: The Table of Contents was generated automatically.
integrity.visual_evidence: The TOC appears as a unified software-generated block (often with gray field shading) or the 'Insert Index/Table' dialog is seen, rather than the agent manually typing out chapter names and page numbers.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Expected Output Path: /home/ga/Documents/AeroTurbine_Master.odm
Expected Title: AeroTurbine 500-X Operator Manual
Chapter Directory: /home/ga/Documents/chapters
Expected Chapters to Link (must be exactly 5): 01_introduction.odt, 02_safety_protocols.odt, 03_operation_procedures.odt, 04_maintenance_schedule.odt, 05_troubleshooting.odt
